places.name: Space

transitions.name: Collision
Crash
LaunchSatellite

differentialEquations.name: Satellite Orbit Dynamics

metrics.name: Satellites in orbit
metrics.description: Number of satellites currently in orbit (the Space place).

metrics.name: Debris objects
metrics.description: Number of defunct objects produced by collisions and crashes.

metrics.name: Average orbital radius
metrics.description: Mean distance of orbiting satellites from the planet centre (the origin).

metrics.name: Average orbital speed
metrics.description: Mean speed of the satellites currently in orbit.

scenarios.name: Moon Orbit
scenarios.description: Low gravity, small body. Satellites drift in gentle arcs around a lunar-mass body.

scenarios.name: Earth Orbit
scenarios.description: Standard Earth gravity. High orbital velocities with frequent launches into low orbit.

scenarios.name: Mars Orbit
scenarios.description: Intermediate gravity between Moon and Earth. Moderate orbital speeds with a thin atmosphere margin.

scenarios.name: Solar Orbit
scenarios.description: Massive central body with extreme gravity. Satellites need very high velocities to maintain distant orbits.
